title: sorghum exile
intro: Sorghum exile, also known as desert broom or broomstick, is a type of shrub that belongs to the sorghum family and is native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of sorghum exile include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
